meaning: n.为练习守备所击的飞球
examples: The outfielder said Saturday he will have follow-up X-rays Tuesday and also hopes to be cleared to start swinging a fungo bat.
Granderson says he has not started swinging a bat yet, but hopes that later this week he could be cleared to swing a fungo bat.
If he receives the go-ahead from Rosenwasser, Teixeira expects to spend New York's six-game, seven-day homestand working his way from dry swings to hitting with a fungo bat and then soft tosses.
